recommendations.title: Deadpool & Wolverine
recommendations.overview: A listless Wade Wilson toils away in civilian life with his days as the morally flexible mercenary, Deadpool, behind him. But when his homeworld faces an existential threat, Wade must reluctantly suit-up again with an even more reluctant Wolverine.

recommendations.title: Day Watch
recommendations.overview: A man who serves in the war between the forces of Light and Dark comes into possession of a device that can restore life to Moscow, which was nearly destroyed by an apocalyptic event.

recommendations.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
recommendations.overview: Struggling to find his place in the world while juggling school and family, Brooklyn teenager Miles Morales is unexpectedly bitten by a radioactive spider and develops unfathomable powers just like the one and only Spider-Man. While wrestling with th
recommendations.director: Rodney Rothman, Peter Ramsey, Bob Persichetti

recommendations.title: Tootsie
recommendations.overview: When struggling, out of work actor Michael Dorsey secretly adopts a female alter ego – Dorothy Michaels – in order to land a part in a daytime drama, he unwittingly becomes a feminist icon and ends up in a romantic pickle.

recommendations.title: The Old Ways
recommendations.overview: Cristina, a journalist of Mexican origin, travels to her ancestral home in Veracruz to investigate a story of sorcery and healing. There, she is kidnapped by a group of locals who claim she's the devil incarnated.

recommendations.title: Black Lotus
recommendations.overview: An ex-special forces operative wages a one man war through the streets of Amsterdam to rescue his friend's daughter from the local crime syndicate.

recommendations.title: Transfusion
recommendations.overview: Ryan Logan, a former Special Forces operative, is battling to cope with life after the loss of his wife.  He is thrusted into the criminal underworld to keep his only son from being taken from him.

recommendations.title: RE:BORN
recommendations.overview: A former special forces operative struggling to contain the destructive impulses of his past goes on a rampage against a squad of ruthless assassins.

recommendations.title: The Day of the Beast
recommendations.overview: When a rogue priest discovers the exact date the Antichrist will be born, he enlists a Death Metal record store clerk and a cheesy TV psychic for an urban spree of gore, sacrilege and twisted humor to prevent the Apocalypse.

recommendations.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
recommendations.overview: Following the events of Captain America: Civil War, Peter Parker, with the help of his mentor Tony Stark, tries to balance his life as an ordinary high school student in Queens, New York City, with fighting crime as his superhero alter ego Spider-Man
